items.title: UBS Raises PT on UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH)  to $378, Maintains ‘Buy’ Rating
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is one of the Top 15 Stocks to Buy in 11 Different Sectors for the Next 3 Months. On September 10, 2025, UBS raised its price target for UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) from $330 to $378, maintaining a ‘Buy’ rating. items.title: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH)’s Director Charles D. Baker Sells 27 Shares of Common Stock at $356.05 per Share
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is one of the 15 Best Stocks to Invest in for Financial Stability. UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) announced on September 15, 2025, that its Director Charles D. Baker sold 27 shares of common stock on September 11 at $356.05 per share, totaling $9,613.
